heroSubtitle: A collaborative platform for parents and clinicians to support child development every step of the way.
servicesSectionSubtitle: We provide the tools to foster a collaborative and insightful child development journey.
serviceCollaborativeDescription: Parents and clinicians work together, sharing notes, resources, and progress updates in a secure, unified space.
serviceProgressDescription: Log milestones, track growth, and monitor progress with intuitive charts and timelines.
serviceInsightsDescription: Leverage AI-powered tools to gain deeper understanding and identify patterns in a child's development.
featuresSectionSubtitle: Everything you need to manage and monitor child development effectively.
featureSecureProfiles: Secure child profiles with detailed notes and history.
featureRBAC: Role-based access for parents, clinicians, and admins.
featureNoteTaking: Centralized, collaborative note-taking and document sharing.
featureResponsiveDesign: Fully responsive design for access on any device.
featureExpertSupport: Direct line of communication with expert clinicians.
featuresImageAlt: A preview of the application's user-friendly interface.
faqQuestionSecurity: How secure is my child's data?
faqAnswerSecurity: We prioritize security with end-to-end encryption, role-based access controls, and compliance with privacy regulations to ensure your data is safe and confidential.
faqQuestionCollaboration: How does collaboration between parents and clinicians work?
faqAnswerCollaboration: The platform provides a shared space where parents and clinicians can exchange notes, upload documents, and view the same progress data in real-time, ensuring everyone is on the same page.
faqQuestionTracking: What kind of progress can I track?
faqAnswerTracking: You can track a wide range of developmental milestones, physical growth (height/weight), communication skills, motor skills, and goals set by clinicians. All data is visualized to show trends over time.
faqQuestionDevices: Can I access the platform on any device?
faqAnswerDevices: Yes, Raising Atlantic is a fully responsive web application, meaning you can access it from your desktop, tablet, or smartphone with a consistent and user-friendly experience.
testimonialQuote1: This platform has been a game-changer for our family. Being able to see real-time updates from our therapist has made us feel so much more involved and informed.
testimonialQuote2: As a clinician, Raising Atlantic streamlines my workflow and enhances my ability to collaborate with parents. The data visualization tools are fantastic.
testimonialQuote3: Finally, a tool that bridges the communication gap between home and the clinic. It’s intuitive, secure, and has made a real difference for my child.
testimonialQuote4: The shared resources section is incredibly helpful. I can easily provide parents with materials and track what they've accessed.
testimonialQuote5: I love the milestone tracking feature. It's so rewarding to look back and see how far my son has come, all in one organized place.
testimonialQuote6: Secure, reliable, and user-friendly. This is the future of collaborative pediatric care. I highly recommend it to my colleagues.
testimonialQuote7: The transparency this platform provides is unparalleled. It fosters a true partnership between our family and our child's care team.
leadCaptureSubtitle: Join our waiting list to get early access and stay updated on our launch. Let's build a better future, together.
leadFormMessagePlaceholder: Tell us a bit about what you're looking for...
leadFormSuccessDescription: We've received your request for early access. We'll be in touch soon!
aboutPageContent: At Raising Atlantic, our mission is to create a seamless, collaborative environment where parents and clinicians can work together to support child development. We believe that by bridging the communication gap and providing powerful, intuitive tools, we can empower families and professionals to achieve the best possible outcomes for every child. Our platform is built on a foundation of security, empathy, and innovation, ensuring that the focus always remains on the child's well-being and progress.
clinicDirectorsIntro: At Atlantic Children's Practice, our team is passionate about providing compassionate, expert care for your little ones. With diverse expertise and a shared commitment to supporting families, we are here to help your child thrive every step of the way.
contactPageSubtitle: We'd love to hear from you! Whether you have a question about our platform, need support, or just want to say hello, please use the form below.
contactFormSuccessDescription: Thank you, {{name}}! We've received your message and will get back to you shortly.
directoryPageContent: Our directory of clinicians and practices is currently under construction. Please check back soon to find trusted professionals in your area who are part of the Raising Atlantic network.
